auditReconciliation.honestyRule: PASS > SKIPPED — live_proven requires smoke artifact PASS, not wiring-only

toast.safeTalkTrack: Toast owns in-restaurant hardware and scale. We target operators who want a unified cloud OS with AI modules and B2B supply marketplace — pre-customer and honest about BETA integrations.

osKitchenWinsQualified: Commissary / ghost kitchen / meal-prep ICP focus
AI Restaurant Brain on Today Command Center
square.safeTalkTrack: Square is the default for simple retail POS. We build for operators who run production kitchens and multi-channel fulfillment — still early on proof.

competitorWins: Established restaurant and retail install base
osKitchenWinsQualified: Today hub and digital twin simulation (BETA)
lightspeed.safeTalkTrack: Lightspeed has proven multi-site deployments. We match on schema ambition but not on LIVE integrations or customer proof yet.

competitorWins: Simple in-venue POS for cafés and QSR
clover.safeTalkTrack: Clover wins simple counter POS and payments bundles. We target operators who run production kitchens and multi-channel fulfillment — pre-customer with honest BETA labels.

osKitchenWinsQualified: AI Restaurant Brain briefing on Today
Integration honesty UI for pre-LIVE posture
touchbistro.safeTalkTrack: TouchBistro fits dine-in table service. OS Kitchen fits hybrid operators who need kitchen production truth and B2B supply — not table-management parity claims.

competitorWins: Growing US install base and field sales
osKitchenWinsQualified: 7 proprietary AI modules in one codebase
spoton.safeTalkTrack: SpotOn competes on bundled payments and mid-market restaurant POS. We sell a kitchen operating system with AI modules — still proving pilot KPIs and LIVE integrations.

competitorWins: Certified enterprise stack and SI partner network
osKitchenWinsQualified: AI module breadth in one repo (pilot unproven)

oracle_simphony.safeTalkTrack: Oracle Simphony wins global franchise RFPs. OS Kitchen is not enterprise-ready day one — target commissaries and ≤5-location operators until SSO/SOC2 and LIVE proof land.
